title: 13-Week Cash Forecast
subtitle: 4 actual · 9 projected
ask_prompt: My 13-week cash forecast shows: current balance {balance}, lowest projected cash {lowest} (week of {week}). Avg weekly inflow {avgIn}, avg outflow {avgOut}. What should I do to improve my cash runway?
forecast_note: Forecast based on trailing weekly average. Add receivables/payables to include known flows.
negative_warning: ⚠ Cash goes negative in week of {week} — action required
